text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost last time... But this<n>one I'll win for
sure!

Of course. I'm not giving anyone the<n>chance to
look down on me.
I'll put on an amazing display, take<n>first place...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And show them all I can do it!
